lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕ ਮਃ ੩ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Salok, Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਬ੍ਰਹਮੁ ਬਿੰਦਹਿ ਤੇ ਬ੍ਰਾਹਮਣਾ ਜੇ ਚਲਹਿ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਭਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: braham bindeh te braahamanaa je chaleh satigur bhaae |
lines.english: He alone knows God, and he alone is a Brahmin, who walks in harmony with the Will of the True Guru.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨ ਕੈ ਹਿਰਦੈ ਹਰਿ ਵਸੈ ਹਉਮੈ ਰੋਗੁ ਗਵਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: jin kai hiradai har vasai haumai rog gavaae |
lines.english: One whose heart is filled with the Lord, is freed of egotism and disease.

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਸੁ ਜੁਗ ਮਹਿ ਵਿਰਲੇ ਬ੍ਰਾਹਮਣ ਬ੍ਰਹਮੁ ਬਿੰਦਹਿ ਚਿਤੁ ਲਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: eis jug meh virale braahaman braham bindeh chit laae |
lines.english: How rare are those Brahmins who, in this age, come to know God, by lovingly focusing their consciousness on Him.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਣ ਰਵਹਿ ਗੁਣ ਸੰਗ੍ਰਹਹਿ ਜੋਤੀ ਜੋਤਿ ਮਿਲਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: gun raveh gun sangraheh jotee jot milaae |
lines.english: He chants the Lord's Praises, gathers virtue, and his light merges into the Light.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਜਿਨੑ ਕਉ ਨਦਰਿ ਕਰੇ ਹਰਿ ਸਚਾ ਸੇ ਨਾਮਿ ਰਹੇ ਲਿਵ ਲਾਇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: naanak jina kau nadar kare har sachaa se naam rahe liv laae |1|
lines.english: O Nanak, those who are blessed by the Lord's Glance of Grace, remain lovingly attuned to the Name of the True Lord. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਕੀ ਸੇਵ ਨ ਕੀਤੀਆ ਸਬਦਿ ਨ ਲਗੋ ਭਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: satigur kee sev na keeteea sabad na lago bhaau |
lines.english: One who does not serve the True Guru, and who does not love the Word of the Shabad,

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਉਮੈ ਰੋਗੁ ਕਮਾਵਣਾ ਅਤਿ ਦੀਰਘੁ ਬਹੁ ਸੁਆਉ ॥
lines.translit: haumai rog kamaavanaa at deeragh bahu suaau |
lines.english: earns the very painful disease of egotism; he is so very selfish.

lines.translit: mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਜਨਮੁ ਸਫਲੁ ਹੈ ਜਿਸ ਨੋ ਆਪੇ ਲਏ ਮਿਲਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: guramukh janam safal hai jis no aape le milaae |
lines.english: The birth of the Gurmukh is fruitful and auspicious. The Lord unites him with Himself.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨਹਠਿ ਕਰਮ ਕਮਾਵਣੇ ਫਿਰਿ ਫਿਰਿ ਜੋਨੀ ਪਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: manahatth karam kamaavane fir fir jonee paae |
lines.english: Acting stubborn-mindedly, he is reincarnated over and over again.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭ ਵਡਿਆਈਆ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮ ਵਿਚਿ ਹਰਿ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਧਿਆਈਐ ॥
lines.translit: sabh vaddiaaeea har naam vich har guramukh dhiaaeeai |
lines.english: All glorious greatness is in the Name of the Lord; as Gurmukh, meditate on the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਨਦਰੀ ਨਦਰਿ ਕਰੇ ਤਾ ਨਾਮ ਧਨੁ ਪਲੈ ਪਾਇ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: naanak nadaree nadar kare taa naam dhan palai paae |2|
lines.english: O Nanak, when the Merciful Lord grants His Mercy, one obtains the wealth of the Naam, the Name of the Lord. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿ ਵਸਤੁ ਮੰਗੀਐ ਸਾਈ ਪਾਈਐ ਜੇ ਨਾਮਿ ਚਿਤੁ ਲਾਈਐ ॥
lines.translit: ji vasat mangeeai saaee paaeeai je naam chit laaeeai |
lines.english: One obtains all that he asks for, if he keeps his consciousness focused on the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਹਜ ਗਲ ਜੀਅ ਕੀ ਕੀਚੈ ਸਤਿਗੁਰੂ ਪਾਸਿ ਤਾ ਸਰਬ ਸੁਖੁ ਪਾਈਐ ॥
lines.translit: guhaj gal jeea kee keechai satiguroo paas taa sarab sukh paaeeai |
lines.english: If he tells the secrets of his soul to the True Guru, then he finds absolute peace.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰੁ ਪੂਰਾ ਹਰਿ ਉਪਦੇਸੁ ਦੇਇ ਸਭ ਭੁਖ ਲਹਿ ਜਾਈਐ ॥
lines.translit: gur pooraa har upades dee sabh bhukh leh jaaeeai |
lines.english: When the Perfect Guru bestows the Lord's Teachings, then all hunger departs.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਤੇ ਖਾਲੀ ਕੋ ਨਹੀ ਮੇਰੈ ਪ੍ਰਭਿ ਮੇਲਿ ਮਿਲਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: satigur te khaalee ko nahee merai prabh mel milaae |
lines.english: No one goes away empty-handed from the True Guru; He unites me in Union with my God.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕ ਮਃ ੩ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Salok, Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸੁ ਪੂਰਬਿ ਹੋਵੈ ਲਿਖਿਆ ਸੋ ਹਰਿ ਗੁਣ ਗਾਈਐ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: jis poorab hovai likhiaa so har gun gaaeeai |3|
lines.english: One who is blessed with such pre-ordained destiny, sings the Glorious Praises of the Lord. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਕਾ ਸਬਦੁ ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤੁ ਹੈ ਸਭ ਤ੍ਰਿਸਨਾ ਭੁਖ ਗਵਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: gur kaa sabad amrit hai sabh trisanaa bhukh gavaae |
lines.english: The Word of the Guru's Shabad is Ambrosial Nectar. It banishes all hunger and thirst.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਕਾ ਦਰਸਨੁ ਸਫਲੁ ਹੈ ਜੇਹਾ ਕੋ ਇਛੇ ਤੇਹਾ ਫਲੁ ਪਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: satigur kaa darasan safal hai jehaa ko ichhe tehaa fal paae |
lines.english: Fruitful is the Blessed Vision of the Darshan of the True Guru; through it, one obtains whatever fruitful rewards he desires.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਰਸੁ ਪੀ ਸੰਤੋਖੁ ਹੋਆ ਸਚੁ ਵਸਿਆ ਮਨਿ ਆਏ ॥
lines.translit: har ras pee santokh hoaa sach vasiaa man aae |
lines.english: Drinking in the sublime essence of the Lord brings contentment; the True Lord comes to dwell in the mind.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚੁ ਧਿਆਇ ਅਮਰਾ ਪਦੁ ਪਾਇਆ ਅਨਹਦ ਸਬਦ ਵਜਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: sach dhiaae amaraa pad paaeaa anahad sabad vajaae |
lines.english: Meditating on the True Lord, the status of immortality is obtained; the Unstruck Word of the Shabad vibrates and resounds.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚੋ ਦਹ ਦਿਸਿ ਪਸਰਿਆ ਗੁਰ ਕੈ ਸਹਜਿ ਸੁਭਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: sacho deh dis pasariaa gur kai sehaj subhaae |
lines.english: The True Lord is pervading in the ten directions; through the Guru, this is intuitively known.

lines.translit: mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਜਿਨ ਅੰਦਰਿ ਸਚੁ ਹੈ ਸੇ ਜਨ ਛਪਹਿ ਨ ਕਿਸੈ ਦੇ ਛਪਾਏ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: naanak jin andar sach hai se jan chhapeh na kisai de chhapaae |1|
lines.english: O Nanak, those humble beings who have the Truth deep within, are never hidden, even if others try to hide them. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਸੇਵਾ ਤੇ ਹਰਿ ਪਾਈਐ ਜਾ ਕਉ ਨਦਰਿ ਕਰੇਇ ॥
lines.translit: gur sevaa te har paaeeai jaa kau nadar karee |
lines.english: Serving the Guru, one finds the Lord, when the Lord blesses him with His Glance of Grace.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਉਮੈ ਮਾਰਿ ਮਿਲਾਇਅਨੁ ਗੁਰ ਕੈ ਸਬਦਿ ਸੁਚੇਇ ॥
lines.translit: haumai maar milaaeian gur kai sabad suchee |
lines.english: Conquering egotism, they are blended with the Lord; through the Word of the Guru's Shabad, they are purified.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਨਸ ਤੇ ਦੇਵਤੇ ਭਏ ਸਚੀ ਭਗਤਿ ਜਿਸੁ ਦੇਇ ॥
lines.translit: maanas te devate bhe sachee bhagat jis dee |
lines.english: Human beings become angels, when the Lord blesses them with true devotional worship.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਵਿਚਿ ਨਾਵੈ ਕੀ ਵਡੀ ਵਡਿਆਈ ਹਰਿ ਕਰਤੈ ਆਪਿ ਵਧਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: gur satigur vich naavai kee vaddee vaddiaaee har karatai aap vadhaaee |
lines.english: Within the Guru, the True Guru, is the glorious greatness of the Name. The Creator Lord Himself has magnified it.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਸਹਜੇ ਮਿਲਿ ਰਹੇ ਨਾਮੁ ਵਡਿਆਈ ਦੇਇ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: naanak sahaje mil rahe naam vaddiaaee dee |2|
lines.english: O Nanak, they remain merged with the Lord; they are blessed with the glorious greatness of the Naam. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੇਵਕ ਸਿਖ ਸਭਿ ਵੇਖਿ ਵੇਖਿ ਜੀਵਨੑਿ ਓਨੑਾ ਅੰਦਰਿ ਹਿਰਦੈ ਭਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: sevak sikh sabh vekh vekh jeevana onaa andar hiradai bhaaee |
lines.english: All His servants and Sikhs live by gazing, gazing upon it. It is pleasing to their hearts deep within.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਿਆ ਹੋਵੈ ਕਿਸ ਹੀ ਕੀ ਝਖ ਮਾਰੀ ਜਾ ਸਚੇ ਸਿਉ ਬਣਿ ਆਈ ॥
lines.translit: kiaa hovai kis hee kee jhakh maaree jaa sache siau ban aaee |
lines.english: What can be achieved by anyone babbling? The Guru is in love with the True Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਿੰਦਕ ਦੁਸਟ ਵਡਿਆਈ ਵੇਖਿ ਨ ਸਕਨਿ ਓਨੑਾ ਪਰਾਇਆ ਭਲਾ ਨ ਸੁਖਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: nindak dusatt vaddiaaee vekh na sakan onaa paraaeaa bhalaa na sukhaaee |
lines.english: The slanderers and evil-doers cannot see this glorious greatness; they do not appreciate the goodness of others.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿ ਗਲ ਕਰਤੇ ਭਾਵੈ ਸਾ ਨਿਤ ਨਿਤ ਚੜੈ ਸਵਾਈ ਸਭ ਝਖਿ ਝਖਿ ਮਰੈ ਲੋਕਾਈ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: ji gal karate bhaavai saa nit nit charrai savaaee sabh jhakh jhakh marai lokaaee |4|
lines.english: That which is pleasing to the Creator Lord, increases day by day, while all the people babble uselessly. ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਸੁਖੁ ਪਲੑਰਿ ਤਿਆਗਿਆ ਨਾਮੁ ਵਿਸਾਰਿ ਦੁਖੁ ਪਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: har sukh palar tiaagiaa naam visaar dukh paae |
lines.english: One who forsakes the peace of the Lord in exchange for straw, and forgets the Naam, suffers in pain.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕ ਮਃ ੩ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Salok, Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਧ੍ਰਿਗੁ ਏਹ ਆਸਾ ਦੂਜੇ ਭਾਵ ਕੀ ਜੋ ਮੋਹਿ ਮਾਇਆ ਚਿਤੁ ਲਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: dhrig eeh aasaa dooje bhaav kee jo mohi maaeaa chit laae |
lines.english: Cursed are the hopes in the love of duality; they tie the consciousness to love and attachment to Maya.
